mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.payee, b.amount, b.transaction_time, b.payment_method_id, pm.name AS payment_method_name, b.transaction_no, b.category_id, bc.name AS category_name, b.remark, b.create_time FROM bill b LEFT JOIN payment_method pm ON b.payment_method_id = pm.id LEFT JOIN bill_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
